title: Branching Streams Flow in the Darkness
author: Shunryu Suzuki
description: When Shunryu Suzuki Roshi's Zen Mind, Beginner's Mind was published in 1972, it was enthusiastically embraced by Westerners eager for spiritual insight and knowledge of Zen.
